temporal_description:
(00:00-00:01) A blonde woman, Phoebe, wearing a black crop top and a patterned open shirt, smiles warmly as she adjusts her shoulder strap. She is standing in a living room, with a vintage circus poster for 'Jouet' visible behind her. (Storyline: The scene opens on Phoebe, establishing her presence in the living room, likely arriving for a gathering.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: Faint laughter can be heard.)
(00:02-00:05) The camera cuts to a wide shot of the living room, showing all six friends. Phoebe is kneeling on the floor, and Joey is standing over the couch, gesturing with his hands as if to stop her. Monica, Rachel, Ross, and Chandler are seated on the couches, watching the interaction. (Storyline: Phoebe's arrival is interrupted by Joey, who seems to be preventing her from doing something. The rest of the group observes the unfolding scene.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Phoebe's tone is dismissive and slightly amused. 2) Background sounds or music: None.)
(00:06-00:09) The camera cuts back to a medium shot of Phoebe. She holds up her hands defensively, palms open, as she explains to Joey that he is not interested in what she was about to do. (Storyline: Phoebe clarifies her statement to Joey, indicating that she was about to offer him something he wouldn't like.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Phoebe's tone is explanatory and a bit playful. 2) Background sounds or music: None.)
